notes: Run each scenario in a fresh context with the loovie MCP server connected.

scenarios.prompt: Add captions to the second clip of my beach Loovie project
assertions: The agent reads loovie://projects/{id} before making any edit
add_caption is used (with execute_transcribe_audio first if a transcript is needed)

scenarios.prompt: Change the background music on my latest Loovie project to something upbeat
assertions: The agent browses loovie://library/music before calling set_music_track

scenarios.prompt: My project is done, render it to MP4
Apply the 'Teal & Orange' LUT to clip 1
assertions: The agent tells the user LUT application is not supported via MCP yet
The agent does not attempt project_apply_patch or invent a workaround
The agent offers set_clip_color_grading as the available alternative

scenarios.prompt: Simulate: an editor tool returns a 422 validation error
assertions: The agent re-reads the project, recomputes the edit, and retries once
The agent does not delete clips to make the error go away
